title: SL23B Welcome Area
desc: Confused about where to start at SL23B? The Welcome Area is a centralized spot where you can get oriented to all the many community exhibits and events at the celebration.

title: Burrow
desc: Since 2009, Burrow has been an inclusive, scenic space on the grid, and after a 3-month renovation, it's back and better than ever. Wander immersive forest trails, sip a coffee at the cozy cafe, catch a show at the Starlight Stage, unwind at the cannabis bar Hex & Haze, or gather with friends for a board game at Grove & Gambit. The options are endless. The perfect space for connection and community.

title: SL23B Tapestry of Time
desc: Learn about the history of Second Life through this interactive exhibit that shows highlights of the evolution of our virtual world.

title: Pour Up Winery & Vineyard
desc: Established in 2021, Pour Up Winery & Vineyard is a scenic, romantic destination perfect for dates, with wine tasting, paint and sip, pottery, fishing, ziplining, horseback riding, live music events,  and vineyard views. Visitors can relax, explore, and enjoy photo opportunities throughout the grounds.

title: Christopher Street
desc: Christopher Street is an LGBTQ+ community that includes shopping and residential. It has tons of cuddle spots and great places for photographers. Grab a notecard at the landing zone for more info on free apartments.

title: Grand Harbor Isle
desc: Celebrate America's 250th anniversary at Grand Harbor Isle, a picturesque coastal destination transformed for a summer-long patriotic celebration. Explore waterfront streets adorned with festive decorations, discover scenic beaches and natural landscapes, stroll through charming seaside neighborhoods, and experience a uniquely American small-town atmosphere inspired by the nation's semiquincentennial celebration.

title: Silent Melody
desc: Silent Melody is a place where the world slows down just enough for you to hear your own heartbeat. Here, paths wind through quiet corners, stories drift on the breeze, and every visitor becomes part of the song. Take your time. Wander. Breathe. Let the hush of this place wrap around you like a familiar tune.

title: City of Edgewater
desc: Nestled along the Carolina coastline, the City of Edgewater is a roleplay community where stories unfold, businesses thrive, and lasting friendships are built. Explore a welcoming city designed for everyday life, community events, and immersive roleplay.

title: Somewhere
desc: Somewhere is a remote island that is inhabited by tribes of rabbits, jackals, and cats. Lots of partying, lots of musicians, nice little villages (one of them rather on the weird side - but hey...), fireside chats, and neighborly gossip.

title: Spirit Tribe by Cica Ghost
desc: Not connected by blood but rather by energy. Those who are there for you through the good and the bad, those who are patient, and those who are supportive of you and your dreams.

title: Cherishville Summer
desc: Welcome to the summer 2026 edition of Cherishville, a peaceful, photogenic destination where you can relax, socialize, and take pictures. Free rezz is available for photography enthusiasts.

title: LGBTQ History Museum and Cultural Center
desc: The LGBTQ History Museum and Cultural Center in Macclaine is a creative and educational space for gay, lesbian, bisexual, and transgender history and culture. Exhibits include LGBT History, Activism, Influential People, LGBT Heroes of 9/11, LGBT Marriage, and HIV/AIDS education.

title: Second Pride
desc: Established in 2005, this destination is the headquarters of the Second Pride organization in Second Life. They hold four annual events, featuring plenty of music and fun. Their Pride 2026 event runs from June 19th to 28th, featuring more than 100 live performances across three stages. There will also be shops, rides, photo ops, and more! More info at second-pride.com

title: Ocho Tango Place
desc: Ocho Tango Place is the home of Argentine Tango. Dance beneath the lights of Buenos Aires while listening to Radio Ocho Tango's carefully curated selection of traditional orchestras, valses, milongas, and contemporary tango. Experienced tangueros and those taking their first steps will find a welcoming atmosphere filled with social dancing, romantic settings, photogenic corners, and a shared love of tango. Here, music, movement, and connection come together in a space where every dance tells a story.

title: Isla De Night
desc: Isla De Night is the perfect starting point for a road trip adventure. Grab a car, explore the pit stops, relax at the beach, and drive across the bridge to the rest of Norway. You never know what amazing places you will discover!

title: Gran Finale Business District
desc: Gran Finale Business District combines luxury living with nightlife, featuring home rentals, a full-service hotel, restaurants, a spa, social gathering spaces, and entertainment venues. Visitors can enjoy live music, dancing, elegant surroundings, and regular events while exploring a destination designed for socializing, relaxation, and connection.

title: LeLoo's World - Age of Giants
desc: LeLoo’s World invites you to journey through a lush prehistoric sanctuary, where towering ferns, ancient trees, and the distant calls of colossal creatures surround you, revealing a realm time has quietly forgotten, a place where wonder and adventure begin the moment you arrive. Everyone is welcome to this PG event!  For best viewing: Use a PBR viewer and Shared Environment. Turn on sounds. LOD set to 4, and draw distance to 150+.

title: Reality Escape
desc: Reality Escape's books, coffee, and chairs are beckoning you to visit! Enjoy a fresh brew and treat in the coffeehouse with your favorite book, pick out your favorite chair in the chair-arch, explore your past, present, and future in the tarot tent, or wander the photogenic spots. Whichever you choose, it will surely lead you away from the weight of reality.

title: The Boathouse Cafe
desc: There is a distinct magic in places weathered by time and salt air, and The Boathouse Cafe captures that beautifully as an idyllic waterfront retreat. Housed in a sun-bleached wooden boathouse, this cozy spot fills your senses with the gentle rhythm of rolling waves and the distant cry of seagulls. Stop by to enjoy a classic plate of fish and chips, or step into the garden with a fresh brew to watch the coastal light change. As a perfect sanctuary for dreamers, photographers, and friends alike, The Boathouse Cafe invites you to slow down and stay a while.

title: Pride At Home
desc: Celebrate diversity at Pride at Home! Since 2020, Pride at Home has been bringing the community together to celebrate love, inclusivity, and connection in Second Life. Explore the destination, discover free gifts at the Expo, and enjoy an exciting lineup of parties and live entertainment. Keep an eye on their event calendar and learn more at prideathome.online
